title: - Clarifying difficult concepts from earlier in the week.
content:
- Clarifying difficult concepts from earlier in the week.
- Providing **individualized feedback on writing skills**.

---

### **VII. Summary of Day 4 Learning Goals**

1. Use **self-guided work time** to complete the **Week 1 quiz and reading comprehension questions**.
2. Apply reading and analytical skills to answer comprehension questions effectively.
3. Engage in **rotating mini-conferences** to clarify course material and receive individualized feedback.
4. Develop **independent learning strategies** by managing time effectively.
5. Reflect on **course structure and personal learning experience** through the **weekly writing warm-up**.

---
